title: distichia muscoides
intro: Distichia muscoides, also known as desert fern, is a type of perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Distichia muscoides can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
